reviews.comment:
Vergüenza que el ACA tenga un lugar así.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that the ACA has a place like this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURleHB2YmVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente como todo ACA, platos de primera calidad y atencion es muy buena. Punto flojo: mucha demora en la entrega del plato, tuve que esperar 40 minutos, el resto excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like everything else at ACA. Top-quality dishes and very good service. The only downside was the long wait for the food; I had to wait 40 minutes. Otherwise, everything was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlLXJIV3BnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios , excelente servicio  los empleados muy amables y serviciales.

El servicentro es más una cafetería.  Nonesta bien surtido , poca variedad pero cumple connsu función.

No hay agua caliente para mate.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms, excellent service, very friendly and helpful employees.

The service station is more of a cafeteria. It's not well-stocked, with little variety, but it serves its purpose.

There's no hot water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlaHEyTGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si estas por mercedes anda a almorzar/cenar a esta YPF. Es de no creer lo bien que se come. Excelente servicio, platos abundantes. Puntuación 10

(Translated by Google)
If you're in Mercedes, go have lunch or dinner at this YPF restaurant. The food is amazing. Excellent service, generous portions. 10/10 rating.
